title: No Fog
description: Removes the fog so you can see in the nether
body:
![title](https://i.postimg.cc/9Fg48Crr/image.png)


# No Fog Mod

**This mod removes the fog making you able to see further in the nether and overworld.**

![banner image of clear nether view](https://i.postimg.cc/50sBpKyw/banner-example.png)

![overworld example of no fog, removed fog](https://i.postimg.cc/zB26kg4V/overworld-nofog.png)

Supports the popular Modloaders Forge and Fabric for the latest Minecraft Versions
